name: Warm Broccoli and Cheese Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix soup mix, sour cream, broccoli, and 1 1/2 cups cheese in a greased shallow casserole dish.  Bake for about 30 minutes.
Sprinkle with rest of cheese and bake until bubbly and warmed through.

similar.name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip

name: Scrumptious Cheese Straws
directions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Combine cheese and margarine in a large bowl and cream thoroughly.  Add remaining ingredients and blend well.
Outfit your cookie press with the star plate.  Squeeze the dough through the press  in fairly straight lines onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake cheese straws in preheated oven for 12 to 15 minutes or until  firm and only beginning to brown.  Cheese Straws freeze beautifully.

name: Cheddar-Stuffed Celery
directions: Mix the mayo & cheddar together to make a spreadable paste.
Fill the stalks.
Cut into serving size pieces.
Sprinkle with paprika or leave plain & serve.

name: Spicy Cheese Crisps
directions: Whisk together flour, salt and cayenne pepper in a medium bowl.  Add cheese and butter.  Work with hands until a dough forms.
Transfer to a sheet of waxed paper.  Form into a 1 1/2" diameter log; roll up tightly in paper.  Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.  Slice dough into 1/4" thick rounds; arrange 1" apart on baking sheets.  Bake until edges are golden, 16-18 minutes; transfer to rack to cool.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche
directions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.  Butter a 9 x 13 inch glass baking dish.

In a blender, whirl the first 6 ingredients.  Pour mixture into a large bowl, and add the last 3 ingredients.  Mix well. Pour into baking dish.  Bake for 15 minutes.  Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake an additional 30 minutes.  Cut into appetizer size squares.  Serve hot or cold.

name: Basil Pesto
directions: Mince basil and garlic in food processor.
Add nuts and mince some more.
Drizzle oil in as machine is running.
When you have a smooth paste transfer to bowl.
Stir in cheese, salt, and pepper.

similar.name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip - Cooking Light 09/07
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine 1 1/2 cups mozzarella, sour cream, 2 tablespoons Parmesan, and next 6 ingredients (through spinach) in a large bowl.
Stir until well blended.
Spoon mixture in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup mozzarella and remaining 2 tablespoons Parmesan.
Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown.

similar.name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip

name: Can't Get Enough Cheese Dip
directions: After allowing the cheeses to soften a bit, place in a bowl and add Miracle whip salad dressing.
Blend until smooth.
Add the garlic powder and blend until creamy and no lumps exist.
You may add more garlic if you like, HOWEVER it seems to  get more garlicky over night, so use control!
Place in a bowl and enjoy!

similar.name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip

name: Crepe
directions: Measure all ingredients into blender jar; blend for 30 seconds.
Scrape down sides.
blend for 15 seconds more.
Cover and let sit for 1 hour (this helps the flour absorb more of the liquids.)not included in preparation time.
Makes 12-14 crepes.
For stuffing mix all ingrediants and roll in crepes.
Variations:
for a sweeter crepe:
Add 2 teaspoons sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
For a Chocolate crepe:
Add 2 tablespoons chocolate sauce to sweet crepe recipe.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Easy Dip
directions: In a medium bowl, combine the cheddar cheese, mayonnaise and green onions.
Once its all stirred together, pour into a small dish.
take the red raspberry jam and pour over the mixture.
Spread it out over the dip in a thin layer.
Now serve with crackers.
YUMMY!

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Quick Sausage Balls
directions: Mix all ingredients together and shape into balls.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 min until brown.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Individual Savoury Bread Puddings
directions: In a food processor or blender, whirl bread to make 2 cups soft breadcrumbs.
In large bowl, combine bread crumbs, milk, Cheddar, peppers, egg yolks, mustard and Worcestershire.
In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold into bread crumb mixture. Spoon into 6 greased 1-cup souffle dishes or into 8 greased 6-oz custard cups.
Bake puddings in centre of 375° oven for 35 to 40 minutes for souffle dishes and 30 to 35 minutes for custard cups; or until puffed and golden brown on top. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.  Mix the mayonnaise and cheeses.  Stir in the artichoke, spinach and red bell pepper.  Spread into a one-quart oven proof casserole dish and spinkle with the monterey cheese.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes until heated through and bubbly and the cheese is melted.  Serve with tortilla chips!  Delicious!

name: Savoury Cheesecake Puffs
directions: preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix 1/3 cup each of flour and parmesan; grease 3 dozen mini muffin tins and spoon flour and parmesan mixture into tins. Roll pan around to coat all sides of tins. Shake out excess.
Beat ricotta, cream cheese, and egg yolks on low speed until smooth.
Gradually beat in rest of ingredients, except chives. Stir in chives, reserving 1/4 cup for sprinkling when serving.
Scoop spoonfuls of batter and push into tins with finger. Fill tins slightly above rims as the batter will puff and then settle. Sprinkle batter with additional chives.
Bake on middle rack of oven 35-40 minutes or until golden on top. Cool before removing from muffin tins. These puffs are ideally served warm, but are also delicious at room temperature.

They can be made ahead, removed from muffin tins, chilled up to 2 days and reheated for serving. To reheat, place on baking sheet in 250°F or 350°F oven for 5-7 minutes or until warmed through (the reheating temperature ranges to allow the cheesecakes to share an oven with other foods baking a the same time.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Smoked Salmon Quesadillas
directions: In a bowl, combine chopped salmon, parmesan cheese, mayo and pepper.  Mix well.
Heat a teflon frying pan on medium heat.
Spread half the mixture on the tortilla in a thin layer.  Top with mozzarella cheese, and top with another tortilla.
Once tortilla starts to brown, flip and heat the other side.
Once bottom tortill is brown, remove from heat and let cool on cutting board.  After 2 minutes, cut with a pizza wheel and serve.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Easy Quiche
directions: Preheat oven to 375.
Lightly grease a 10 inch quiche dish.
In a large bowl, beat together milk, eggs, baking mix, butter, and parmesan cheese.
Batter will be lumpy.
Stir in broccoli, ham, and cheddar cheese.
Pour into prepared quiche dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 50 minutes, until eggs are set and top is golden brown.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche

name: Spinach Squares
directions: Grease a 13 x 9 baking pan.
Sift together flour, salt and baking powder.
Mix onion and grated cheddar. Add to dry ingredients.
Beat eggs. Add milk, butter and squeezed spinach.
Dump wet ingredients into dry and mix.
Bake at 350 for 35 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes.
Cut into small squares.
Can be frozen and reheated for 12 minutes at 350.

similar.name: Simple and Delicious Spinach and Artichoke Dip

name: Chili Relleno Casserole by Epicurious.com
directions: Lightly grease 9x13 inch glass baking dish.
Beat first 5 ingredients in medium bowl to blend.
Arrange chilies in prepared dish, covering bottom completely.
Sprinkle with 1/3 of each cheese.  Repeat layering twice.
Pour egg mixture over cheese.
Let stand 30 minutes (can be prepared a day ahead).  Cover and refrigerate.
Preheat oven to 350.
Bake until casserole is slightly puffed in center and golden brown on edges, about 45 minutes.
Cool 20 minutes and serve.

similar.name: Kristine Wards Green Chilli Cheese Quiche
